content.text:
I'm ready to help you with the Neuman Brain project! I've reviewed the constitution and understand my role as lead autonomous engineer/architect for this privacy-first, local-only productivity dashboard.

**Key takeaways from my warmup:**
- Project is ~1% complete → focus on scalable primitives and root causes
- P0 priorities: data integrity, privacy (local-first, E2EE), security, coherence
- Build features custom, use utility libraries only (MIT/Apache/BSD licensed)
- Smart delegation via tache features when context gets heavy or for multi-stage work
- Intelligent prompt routing will automatically direct work to optimal workflows
- Always read folder-specific CLAUDE.md files when working in those areas
- Session protocol: fetch/merge main, check todos, verify tests before committing

**Current status check:**
- Working directory: `D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase`
- Branch: `main` (clean)
- Recent work: Time tracking improvements (settings, dark mode fixes, sortable headers, performance optimizations)
- Date: 2025-12-01

I'm in **READ-ONLY planning mode** for this session. I can explore the codebase and design implementation plans, but I cannot create, modify, or delete any files.

What would you like me to work on? I can:
- Plan a new feature
- Debug an issue
- Make an architectural decision
- Explore and document existing patterns
- Or anything else you need

Just describe what you need naturally, and intelligent routing will handle the rest.
